/usr/bin/clang++ -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/logviewer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/logviewer.dir/logviewer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logviewer.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logviewer.dir/main.cpp.o -o logviewer  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/bfr/devel/github_procmt_2021/procmt_2021/out/build/Clang 19.1.7 x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/qcustomplot:" /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.11.1 ../../qcustomplot/libqcustomplot.so /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6PrintSupport.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
